name: @zcmsorg/theme-codegen
description: Turns a LayoutDocument drawn in the Theme Editor into a real, buildable Z-CMS theme package.
author: Z-SOFT Co., Ltd. <support@z-cms.org> (https://z-cms.org)
//deps: theme-sdk and theme-widgets are RUNTIME dependencies even though nothing in src/ imports the SDK: the theme this package EMITS imports both, and esbuild resolves them out of this package's own node_modules (see RESOLVE_PATHS in generate.ts). As devDependencies they would vanish from the worker's --prod image and every build would fail to resolve @zcmsorg/theme-sdk — in production only.
